findings.title: Known-vulnerable dependency (OSV)
findings.description: mcp@1.6.0 (PyPI) is affected by CVE-2025-53366: MCP Python SDK vulnerability in the FastMCP Server causes validation error, leading to DoS

findings.title: Trojan Source: bidirectional / invisible unicode in code

findings.description: Source line contains invisible unicode (U+FEFF); code may not read as it executes (CVE-2021-42574)
